title: Health check endpoint returns JSON status
description: The API must expose a GET /healthz endpoint that returns HTTP 200 with a JSON object containing at minimum a 'status' field set to 'ok'. The response must include Content-Type: application/json. The endpoint must not require authentication.

title: Monitoring system scrapes health check endpoint
description: The monitoring configuration must be updated to include /healthz as a scrape target. The scrape interval must be no greater than 30 seconds. The monitoring system must alert on two consecutive failed health checks.
